facts.geo: Patagonia region & the Andes span the country from south to north
facts.history: Independence declared 1816; birthplace of Che Guevara & Jorge Luis Borges
facts.society: Birthplace of the tango (UNESCO), Nobel Prize literature, and modern football icons
facts.cuisine: Asado (wood-fire BBQ), empanadas, dulce de leche & yerba mate

facts.geo: Great Barrier Reef (world's largest coral reef system) & the vast Outback
facts.history: Aboriginal Australians hold the world's oldest continuous culture, dating 65,000+ years
facts.society: Cate Blanchett, Hugh Jackman & Nick Kyrgios; pioneered women's suffrage (1902)
facts.cuisine: Meat pies, Vegemite on toast, Tim Tams, barramundi & a renowned coffee culture

facts.geo: The Alps dominate the west; the Danube River crosses the country east to west
facts.history: Habsburg Empire ruled much of Europe for 600 years; birthplace of Mozart & Freud
facts.society: Classical music capital of the world — home to Mozart, Schubert, Mahler & Strauss
facts.cuisine: Wiener Schnitzel, Sachertorte, Apfelstrudel & the beloved Viennese coffee house

facts.geo: Ardennes forest in the south; flat polders and North Sea coast in the north
facts.history: Battlefield of two World Wars; founding member of the EU, headquartered in Brussels
facts.society: Surrealist artist René Magritte; Audrey Hepburn's birthplace; EU & NATO HQ
facts.cuisine: Belgian waffles, moules-frites, over 1,500 beer varieties & the finest chocolate

facts.geo: Dinaric Alps, Neretva River gorges & the famous Stari Most bridge in Mostar
facts.history: The 1914 Sarajevo assassination triggered WWI; survived the longest siege of a capital in modern warfare (1992–96)
facts.society: Sarajevo hosted the 1984 Winter Olympics; birthplace of Nobel-adjacent Ivo Andrić
facts.cuisine: Ćevapi grilled sausages, burek pastry, bosanski lonac stew & strong Bosnian coffee

facts.geo: Amazon Rainforest (largest on Earth), Iguazu Falls & 7,500 km of Atlantic coastline
facts.history: Colonised by Portugal in 1500; declared independence in 1822 and became a republic in 1889
facts.society: Carnival, Bossa Nova, Oscar Niemeyer's architecture & the most WC titles (5)
facts.cuisine: Feijoada black-bean stew, churrasco BBQ, açaí bowls & brigadeiro chocolate truffles

facts.geo: Archipelago of 10 volcanic islands in the Atlantic, 570 km off West Africa
facts.history: Uninhabited until Portuguese arrival in 1462; a key hub in the transatlantic slave trade
facts.society: Cesária Évora's Morna music is UNESCO Intangible Heritage; strong diaspora culture
facts.cuisine: Cachupa (corn & bean stew), grogue sugarcane rum, fresh tuna & lobster

facts.geo: Second-largest country on Earth; Rocky Mountains, Niagara Falls & vast boreal forests
facts.history: Confederation in 1867; complex history of reconciliation with Indigenous First Nations
facts.society: Gave the world ice hockey, Celine Dion, Drake, Jim Carrey & poutine
facts.cuisine: Poutine (fries, cheese curds, gravy), maple syrup, butter tarts & Montreal smoked meat

facts.geo: Congo River (2nd largest river by discharge) & the world's 2nd largest tropical rainforest
facts.history: Brutally exploited as King Leopold II's private colony; independence from Belgium in 1960
facts.society: Congolese Rumba is UNESCO World Heritage; Kinshasa is one of Africa's largest cities
facts.cuisine: Fufu with saka-saka (cassava leaves), moambe chicken & liboke fish in banana leaf

facts.geo: Only South American country with both Pacific & Caribbean coasts; Andes, Amazon & coffee region
facts.history: Independence from Spain in 1810; birthplace of Nobel laureate Gabriel García Márquez
facts.society: Magical realism in literature, Shakira's global pop, world's finest emerald producer
facts.cuisine: Bandeja paisa platter, arepas, ajiaco potato soup & the finest washed-process coffee

facts.geo: Gulf of Guinea coastline, tropical rainforests & Comoé National Park (UNESCO)
facts.history: French colony until 1960; became the world's leading cocoa producer by the 1970s
facts.society: Didier Drogba (UNICEF Goodwill Ambassador); world's #1 cocoa exporter
facts.cuisine: Attieke (cassava couscous), kedjenou chicken, fried plantain & palm-nut sauce

facts.geo: Over 1,200 Adriatic islands; Plitvice Lakes National Park (UNESCO) & Dubrovnik's medieval walls
facts.history: Part of Yugoslavia until independence in 1991; possible birthplace of Marco Polo
facts.society: Nikola Tesla (Croatian-Serbian heritage), ties (necktie), Dubrovnik as Game of Thrones filming location
facts.cuisine: Peka slow-cooked lamb & octopus, black risotto, Dalmatian pršut ham & truffle dishes

facts.geo: Largest country in Africa; the Sahara Desert covers 80% of its territory
facts.history: French colonial rule (1830–1962) ended after a brutal war of independence; Berber civilization predates recorded history
facts.society: Albert Camus (Nobel laureate) was born in colonial Algeria; Yves Saint Laurent birthplace
facts.cuisine: Couscous (UNESCO heritage), brik pastry, mechoui slow-roasted lamb & merguez sausage

facts.geo: The Galápagos Islands sit 1,000 km off the coast; Cotopaxi is one of the world's highest active volcanoes
facts.history: Part of the Inca Empire, then Spanish colony; the equator (Ecuador in Spanish) runs through its capital
facts.society: Charles Darwin's Galápagos research underpinned evolution theory; Panama hats originated here
facts.cuisine: Ceviche, llapingachos (potato cakes), seco de pollo stew & fanesca (Easter soup)

facts.geo: Nile Delta, Sahara Desert, Red Sea coral reefs & the Sinai Peninsula
facts.history: One of the world's oldest civilisations; Pyramids of Giza are the only remaining Ancient Wonder
facts.society: Naguib Mahfouz won the Nobel Prize in Literature (1988); ancient Egyptian calendar influenced all modern calendars
facts.cuisine: Koshari (rice, lentils & pasta), ful medames (fava beans), ta'ameya (falafel) & molokhia soup

facts.geo: White Cliffs of Dover, the Lake District, Stonehenge & 11,000 km of coastline
facts.history: Magna Carta (1215) pioneered constitutional law; birthplace of the Industrial Revolution
facts.society: Shakespeare, Newton, Darwin, The Beatles, the Premier League & the World Wide Web (Tim Berners-Lee)
facts.cuisine: Fish & chips, full English breakfast, Sunday roast, sticky toffee pudding & chicken tikka masala

facts.geo: Mont Blanc (highest peak in Western Europe), Loire Valley châteaux & the French Riviera
facts.history: French Revolution (1789) birthed modern democracy; Napoleon reshaped European law & borders
facts.society: Monet, Picasso (adopted), Camus, Dior & Chanel; the Louvre holds the world's largest art collection
facts.cuisine: Baguette, croissant, coq au vin, 1,200+ cheese varieties & the world's most celebrated wine regions

facts.geo: Rhine Valley vineyards, Black Forest, Bavarian Alps & Baltic Sea coast
facts.history: Unification in 1871; WWI/WWII originator; Berlin Wall's fall in 1989 reunified the nation
facts.society: Beethoven, Bach, Goethe, Einstein, Gutenberg & the invention of the automobile (Benz)
facts.cuisine: Bratwurst, pretzels, sauerkraut, Black Forest cake, Bavarian beer & over 300 bread varieties

facts.geo: Gulf of Guinea coastline, Lake Volta (one of the world's largest artificial lakes) & Kakum rainforest
facts.history: First sub-Saharan African country to gain independence (1957); formerly the British Gold Coast
facts.society: Kofi Annan (UN Secretary-General), kente cloth weaving & the rise of Afrobeats music
facts.cuisine: Jollof rice, fufu with groundnut soup, kelewele (spiced fried plantain) & waakye

facts.geo: Mount Fuji, 6,852 islands, the Ring of Fire & the world's most celebrated cherry-blossom season
facts.history: Meiji Restoration (1868) rapidly modernised the nation; post-WWII became the world's 3rd largest economy
facts.society: Toyota, Sony, Nintendo, anime, manga & the Michelin-starred restaurant capital of the world
facts.cuisine: Sushi, ramen, tempura, wagyu beef, matcha & the art of kaiseki multi-course dining

facts.geo: Sierra Madre mountains, Yucatán Peninsula with Mayan ruins & the Copper Canyon (deeper than Grand Canyon)
facts.history: Aztec Empire (Tenochtitlán) conquered by Spain in 1521; Revolution of 1910 shaped modern democracy
facts.society: Frida Kahlo, Diego Rivera, Octavio Paz (Nobel Literature) & Day of the Dead (UNESCO Heritage)
facts.cuisine: Tacos, mole sauce, guacamole (origin), tamales & the birthplace of chocolate & chilli peppers

facts.geo: Atlas Mountains, Sahara dunes, Atlantic & Mediterranean coasts & ancient imperial medinas
facts.history: Fes (est. 859 AD) contains the world's oldest university; major bridge between Africa and Europe
facts.society: Ibn Battuta (greatest medieval explorer), argan oil industry & vibrant Amazigh (Berber) culture
facts.cuisine: Tagine slow-cooked stew, couscous Friday, mint tea ceremony, pastilla pigeon pie & harira soup

facts.geo: 25% of the land lies below sea level; Delta Works flood defences are a modern engineering wonder
facts.history: Dutch Golden Age (17th c.) made it the world's dominant trading empire; Anne Frank hid in Amsterdam
facts.society: Rembrandt, Vermeer, Van Gogh, Spinoza, Erasmus; invented the stock market & the telescope
facts.cuisine: Stroopwafel, raw herring (haring), stamppot mash, Gouda & Edam cheese & poffertjes pancakes

facts.geo: Fjords (UNESCO World Heritage), Northern Lights, Midnight Sun & the world's longest road tunnel
facts.history: Vikings (800–1100 AD) explored from North America to Russia; Nobel Peace Prize is awarded in Oslo
facts.society: Edvard Munch (The Scream), Henrik Ibsen, Grieg & the world's highest standard of living (HDI)
facts.cuisine: Salmon (gravlax & smoked), brunost (brown whey cheese), smørbrød open sandwiches & lutefisk

facts.geo: Gran Chaco (one of South America's largest forests) & the Itaipú Dam (world's 2nd largest hydroelectric plant)
facts.history: The War of the Triple Alliance (1864–70) devastated Paraguay, killing ~60% of its population
facts.society: One of the most bilingual nations — Spanish & Guaraní are equally co-official languages
facts.cuisine: Sopa paraguaya (cornbread), chipa cheese bread, mbejú starch flatbread & tereré cold herbal drink

facts.geo: Atlantic coastline with the Algarve, Douro wine valley & the volcanic Azores islands
facts.history: Age of Discovery — Vasco da Gama, Magellan & Cabral built the first global empire in the 15th–16th c.
facts.society: Fado music (UNESCO), Fernando Pessoa (poetry), Cristiano Ronaldo & world's largest cork supplier (50%)
facts.cuisine: Pastéis de nata custard tarts, bacalhau salt-cod (365 recipes), caldo verde soup & Vinho Verde

facts.geo: Cap-Vert is Africa's westernmost point; the Pink Lake (Lac Rose) is coloured by algae
facts.history: Gorée Island was a major transatlantic slave-trade departure point; independence from France in 1960
facts.society: Léopold Sédar Senghor (poet-president), Youssou N'Dour (music legend) & laamb wrestling culture
facts.cuisine: Thiéboudienne (UNESCO: fish & rice national dish), yassa lemon chicken, mafé peanut stew & bissap drink

facts.geo: Table Mountain, Kruger National Park, Cape of Good Hope & the Drakensberg mountain range
facts.history: Apartheid system (1948–1994) ended peacefully; Nelson Mandela served 27 years in prison before becoming president
facts.society: Mandela, Desmond Tutu, Elon Musk (birthplace) & ubuntu philosophy ("I am because we are")
facts.cuisine: Braai (BBQ gathering), biltong dried meat, bobotie minced-meat bake & bunny chow curry bread bowl

facts.geo: Pyrenees, Sierra Nevada, 5,000 km of coastline, the Meseta plateau & Gaudí's Barcelona
facts.history: Spanish Empire (15th–19th c.) colonised the Americas; Cervantes wrote Don Quixote, the first modern novel
facts.society: Picasso, Dalí, Velázquez, Gaudí, Lorca & Almodovar — unmatched artistic legacy
facts.cuisine: Paella, tapas culture, jamón ibérico, gazpacho cold soup, churros & La Rioja wines

facts.geo: Stockholm Archipelago (30,000 islands), Swedish Lapland, Northern Lights & the Midnight Sun
facts.history: Over 200 years of unbroken peace; Vikings (800–1100 AD) explored from Greenland to Baghdad
facts.society: ABBA, IKEA, Spotify, H&M, Volvo & Alfred Nobel who funded the Nobel Prizes
facts.cuisine: Swedish meatballs with lingonberry, gravlax, surströmming (fermented herring), smörgåsbord & Princess cake

facts.geo: Swiss Alps (Matterhorn, Jungfrau), Lake Geneva, Rhine Falls & four national languages
facts.history: Founded in 1291, Switzerland has maintained armed neutrality for over 500 years; Red Cross founded in Geneva (1863)
facts.society: Roger Federer, Le Corbusier, Jean-Jacques Rousseau, CERN (particle physics) & HQ of the UN & Red Cross
facts.cuisine: Fondue, raclette, rösti potato cake, Swiss chocolate (Lindt, Toblerone) & Bircher muesli

facts.geo: Grand Canyon, Yellowstone, Rocky Mountains, Mississippi River & 19,000 km of coastline
facts.history: Independence declared 1776; Moon landing in 1969; led the Allied victory in WWII
facts.society: Hollywood, Silicon Valley (Apple, Google, Meta), jazz, hip-hop & NASA's space programme
facts.cuisine: BBQ (regional styles), clam chowder, Philly cheesesteak, apple pie & the all-American burger
